title: Step Up
description: Allows you to step up blocks without jumping by adding a new enchantment for leggins to the game.
body:
![Step Up Showcase GIF](https://github.com/foenichs/step-up/blob/main/StepUp.gif?raw=true)

**This datapack/mod adds the Step Up enchantment to Minecraft.**
Applied to leggins, it allows players to step up blocks without needing to jump. Just like horses do when climbing small elevations.
